title: Translation Tracker Component Templates
description: Schema for component-templates.yml. Defines (a) the SVG icon path per component name (rendered by the plugin with a 24x24 viewBox wrapper), and (b) the default component list per item type (used when an item has no GitHub issue yet).

icons.description: Component name to SVG path-d attribute. The plugin builds the <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"> wrapper around it.

types.description: Item type to ordered list of component names. Recommended types: lesson, lesson_plan, tutorial, handbook_text, handbook_video.

ComponentList.description: Ordered list of component names referencing entries in `icons`.
